```python
graph = nx.DiGraph()

# Add vertices (represented by strings) to the graph
vertices = ["A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F", "G", "H"]
for vertex in vertices:
    graph.add_node(vertex)

# Add edges (represented as tuples of two elements) to the graph
edges = [("A", "F"), ("A", "B"), ("B", "D"), ("C", "G"), 
         ("D", "A"), ("D", "G"), ("E", "C"), ("E", "F"), 
         ("F", "E"), ("G", "H"), ("H", "C")]

    graph.add_edge(*edge)
```
